title: Tom the Little Tugboat
summary: Маленький храбрый буксир Том помогает большим лодкам в шумной гавани и во время маленького шторма.
character: Tom is a small round red tugboat with a white stripe, a tall little funnel, two big friendly eyes, and a happy smile.
style: cheerful watercolor children's picture-book illustration, rounded shapes, bright sea-and-harbour colours

pages.en: This is Tom. Tom is a little red tugboat. Toot toot!
pages.ru: Это Том. Том — маленький красный буксир. Ту-ту!
pages.scene: A small round red tugboat with a white stripe, a tall little funnel, two big friendly eyes, and a happy smile floats in a bright blue harbour with white clouds and seagulls.

pages.en: Tom lives in a big busy harbour. He is very small. The other boats are very big.
pages.ru: Том живёт в большой шумной гавани. Он очень маленький. Другие лодки очень большие.
pages.scene: The small round red tugboat with a white stripe and a happy smile floats next to many huge tall ships in a busy harbour full of bright colours and blue water.

pages.en: The big boats laugh. "You are too small!" they say. Tom is sad.
pages.ru: Большие лодки смеются. «Ты слишком маленький!» — говорят они. Тому грустно.
pages.scene: The little red tugboat with a white stripe looks sad with droopy eyes, while two big smiling ships laugh above him in the sunny harbour, blue water all around.

pages.en: One day a big boat is stuck. It cannot move. "Help! Help!" it calls.
pages.ru: Однажды большая лодка застряла. Она не может двигаться. «Помогите! Помогите!» — кричит она.
pages.scene: A big worried ship is stuck near the harbour rocks, and the small round red tugboat with a white stripe and big eyes watches close by on the bright blue water.

pages.en: "I can help!" says Tom. He pulls and pulls. Toot toot!
pages.ru: «Я могу помочь!» — говорит Том. Он тянет и тянет. Ту-ту!
pages.scene: The little red tugboat with a white stripe and a happy smile pulls a big ship with a strong rope, water splashing, in a sunny busy harbour.

pages.en: Then the sky is dark. A small storm comes. The wind blows and the waves are big.
pages.ru: Потом небо становится тёмным. Приходит маленький шторм. Дует ветер, и волны большие.
pages.scene: The small round red tugboat with a white stripe bobs on big grey waves under a dark cloudy sky, wind and rain over the harbour, his eyes brave and wide.

pages.en: The big boats are scared. "Follow me!" says Tom. Toot toot!
pages.ru: Большие лодки испугались. «Плывите за мной!» — говорит Том. Ту-ту!
pages.scene: The little red tugboat with a white stripe leads two big frightened ships through grey stormy waves, his light shining bright, dark clouds above the sea.

pages.en: Tom helps everyone. The boats are safe in the harbour. The storm is gone.
pages.ru: Том помогает всем. Лодки в безопасности в гавани. Шторм закончился.
pages.scene: The small round red tugboat with a white stripe and a happy smile floats with big calm ships in a safe harbour as the sky turns bright blue again with a small rainbow.

pages.en: Now all the boats are friends. "Thank you, Tom!" they cheer. Toot toot!
pages.ru: Теперь все лодки — друзья. «Спасибо, Том!» — радуются они. Ту-ту!
pages.scene: The little red tugboat with a white stripe and a big happy smile is in the middle of many cheering big ships in a sunny harbour, seagulls and bright flags everywhere.
